output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX bd: <http://www.bigdata.com/rdf#>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
SELECT ?player ?playerLabel WHERE {
  ?player p:P54 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P54 wd:Q329812 .
  ?statement pq:P119 wd:Q8255 .
  ?statement pq:P580 ?startDate .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?statement pq:P582 ?endDate .
  }
  FILTER(xsd:date(?startDate) <= '2021-12-21' ^^ xsd:date)
  FILTER(! BOUND(?endDate) || xsd:date(?endDate) >= '2021-12-21' ^^ xsd:date)
  SERVICE wikibase:label {
    bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en"
  }
}

args.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>

SELECT ?player ?playerLabel
WHERE {
  ?player p:P54 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P54 wd:Q8255 .
  ?statement pq:P179 wd:Q329812 .
  ?statement pq:P580 ?startDate .
  OPTIONAL { ?statement pq:P582 ?endDate . }
  FILTER ( ?startDate <= '2021-12-21' )
  FILTER ( !BOUND(?endDate) || ?endDate >= '2021-12-21' )
  SERVICE wikibase:label { bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en" }
}
